about.title: How E-Shiksha Works
about.subtitle: Our AI-powered approach to exam preparation
about.heading: Personalized Learning Journey
about.description: E-Shiksha uses advanced AI algorithms to analyze your learning style, strengths, and weaknesses to create a personalized study plan tailored specifically for your target exam.

step1.title: Upload Study Materials
step1.description: Upload your notes, textbooks, or any study materials you have.

step2.title: Take Assessment Quiz
step2.description: Complete a brief assessment to determine your current knowledge level.

step3.title: Get Personalized Plan
step3.description: Receive a customized study plan with daily learning goals.

step4.title: Track Progress
step4.description: Monitor your improvement and adjust your plan as needed.

mock_test.title: Personalized Mock Test
mock_test.description: This personalized mock test is designed to assess your logical reasoning, problem-solving, comprehension, and memory recall abilities. Complete all questions to receive your Daily Learning Capacity Score and personalized recommendations.

mock_test.topics_description: Based on your performance, this is the optimal number of topics to study each day.
